component.name: Compressi.ty
component.summary: Local-first desktop compression toolkit for photos, audio, and videos

description.p: Compressi.ty is a local-first desktop compression toolkit built with Rust. It can compress photos, audio, and videos on-device without requiring files to be uploaded to a cloud service.
The app includes guided workspaces for media compression, bundled FFmpeg support for video and audio workflows, queue-based processing, and configurable output locations.
